caveat: Travison is preferred for harmonized male serum context; Van der Veen is plasma context; Haring adds female age-banded LC-MS/MS rows; Frederiksen adds female cycle-day serum percentiles; do not use as diagnosis.
Verdonk is preferred for LH-aligned CDC-traceable intervals; Frederiksen adds calendar-day cycle profile percentiles; CDC literature rows stay review-only.
